case_title: ALEXANDER MITELMAN VS. HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITELMAN, ALEXANDER SERVED SEP-01-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MITELMAN, ALEXANDER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC. THERE IS NO PRIVITY OF CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT WHO OWED AN ORDINARY DUTY OF CARE FOR PLAINTIFF'S GOODS. THE EVIDENCE DID NOT SUPPORT A BREACH OF THAT DUTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/31/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITELMAN, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO OCTOBER 28, 2016 AT 10:00AM. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LORI-ANNE ROSE, DIRECTOR OF FINANCE AND ADMINISTRATION. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITELMAN, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,950.00 FILED BY MITELMAN, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S WIFE ALIS FITZGERALD AND THE DEFENDANT HOME DELIVERY LOGISTICS, INC. REPRESENTATIVE LORI ANNE ROSE, DIRECTOR OF FINCANCE AND ADMIN. THE PLAITIFF IS REQUESTING A CONTINUANCE DUE TO A FAMILY EMERGENCY STEMINING FROM HURRICANE MATTHEW BACK EAST INVOLVING THE PLAINTIFF'S AILING PARENTS. THE REQUEST WAS GRANTED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
